title: Blinking Stars
description: The Blinking Stars mod changes the look of stars and gives you the ability to blink a star. Features can be toggled using ModMenu.
body:
Blinking Stars

Feeling like the vanilla stars look a bit boring? Why are they all completely static? Why don't they flicker? And why are they all the same brightness and color? That is what Blinking Stars does.

Usage

All of the stars vary in 5 different colors: red, yellow, green, pink and white. They also flicker slightly and they are a bit smaller then usual. On random occurances a falling star will drop. In the miscellanious keybinds you can bind a key to "blink" a star. Pressing this button while looking at a star will cause it to blink. You can use this on a server to guide players in a direction.

Using the /curse command you can apply a solar curse to your world. When a solar curse occures mobs will not burn at day. This curse is an experimental feature and does not do that much yet.
